blockers.description: Background gsd-planner agent (ab05dd8dfaa9005f4) was mid-task writing remaining Phase 8 plans when /gsd-pause-work was invoked — its completion status is unknown
blockers.workaround: On resume, first check .planning/phases/08-domain-crud-endpoints/ for new PLAN.md files beyond 08-01/02/03, and try sending that agent ID a status-check message before spawning a fresh planner — avoid duplicate/conflicting plan files for 08-04+

blockers.description: LOGIC-02 race-condition mechanism (DB unique constraint vs Prisma interactive transaction) was explicitly NOT yet decided as of pause time — it was assigned to the in-flight planner agent
blockers.workaround: Verify the resumed planner's keputusan-approval plan explicitly states and justifies the chosen mechanism before accepting it; do not let it slip through as a TODO

human_actions_pending.action: Push local commits to origin: `! git push origin main`
human_actions_pending.context: Push from within this agent session does not reliably work due to Git Credential Manager requiring interactive auth; user has done this successfully every time when running it themselves via shell-passthrough

decisions.decision: Used Docker Desktop (started programmatically) for local PostgreSQL instead of a native install
decisions.rationale: No psql/PostgreSQL was natively installed in the dev environment; Docker CLI was present but the daemon was stopped — started it and confirmed docker ps works

decisions.decision: model_profile toggled per-phase: budget for Phase 6, balanced for Phase 7 and 8
decisions.rationale: Phase 6 is mechanical/standard-pattern scaffolding (research itself flagged it as low-risk); Phase 7/8 carry security and concurrency stakes that warrant the stronger planner/checker models

decisions.decision: Skipped dedicated gsd-verifier agent spawns at phase-level; instead personally re-ran each phase's standalone .verify.mjs scripts before calling phase.complete
decisions.rationale: Project config has workflow.verifier=false (pre-existing, not part of this session's overrides) — init.execute-phase JSON reports verifier_enabled: false

decisions.decision: All executors run sequentially on the main working tree, never with isolation="worktree"

Fixed a Windows-specific bug in the 'run directly' entrypoint check in server/src/index.js: replaced `import.meta.url === \`file://${process.argv[1]}\`` with `import.meta.url === pathToFileURL(process.argv[1]).href`
decisions.rationale: process.argv[1] uses backslashes on Windows while import.meta.url always uses forward slashes, so the naive comparison silently never matched and app.listen() was never called

decisions.decision: commit_docs:false discipline strictly enforced — zero .planning/ commits during Phase 6/7/8 execution so far; only server/ code commits per task
decisions.rationale: Explicit user rule 6/7: commit only src/+server code per phase, batch-commit all .planning/ docs in one commit after Phase 10 finishes

uncommitted_files: .planning/phases/ (untracked — includes 06-*, 07-*, 08-* phase dirs, all PLAN/SUMMARY files)
next_action: Check whether background agent ab05dd8dfaa9005f4 finished writing the remaining Phase 8 plans (look for 08-04-PLAN.md+ in .planning/phases/08-domain-crud-endpoints/, or send it a status-check SendMessage). If complete and LOGIC-02's race-safety mechanism is explicitly decided, run gsd-plan-checker on the full Phase 8 plan set, then execute wave-by-wave. If incomplete, resume/re-spawn to finish only the missing pieces (keputusan race-safe approval, ranking/KPI endpoint, notifikasi+activityLog generation) without touching 08-01/02/03.
context_notes: This is an autonomous multi-phase run (v2.0 Phases 6-10, backend migration milestone) following a 7-rule user instruction: skip-research, chain plan+execute, minimal interaction/no confirmation for small decisions, commit only code per-phase (not .planning/), one final .planning/ batch commit after Phase 10. Phases 6 and 7 are fully executed, independently re-verified via their own .verify.mjs scripts, and marked complete via gsd_run query phase.complete (no warnings either time). Phase 8 is the largest phase (full REST CRUD parity across 7 domains + ranking engine + race-safe decision approval + server-side activity-log/notification generation) and was deliberately planned as multiple plans across multiple waves rather than 2-3 plans, per explicit instruction to the planner to avoid shallow execution. The planner hit a session-limit interrupt mid-task (reset at 12:30am Asia/Jakarta) after writing 3 of an estimated 5-6 plans; it was resumed via SendMessage with instructions to finish the remaining scope (keputusan/ranking/notif) without redoing the first 3. Whether that resumption completed before this pause is unknown — that is the single most important thing to check first on resume.
